name: Asim Khan Niazi
title: Web Developer & AI Enthusiast
summary: Computer Science graduate, Web Developer, and AI enthusiast with strong expertise in backend development, AI-powered systems, and automation. Experienced in building real-world, production-oriented applications using Flask, FastAPI, React, MongoDB, and intelligent agents with LangChain and n8n. Final Year Project focuses on an AI-driven healthcare platform integrating voice AI, NLP, telephony APIs, and secure system design. Passionate educator known for simplifying complex technical concepts and building strong programming fundamentals.

finalYearProject.title: MediCall AI – AI Powered Healthcare Platform

finalYearProject.solution: Built a credit-based AI system to automate symptom analysis, consultations, and medicine delivery.
